ddls:
CREATE TABLE "theaters" (
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the theater is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the theater */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the theater */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the theater */,
  "screen_count" INTEGER /* Number of screens in the theater */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Parking capacity of the theater */,
  "wifi_available" INTEGER /* Whether the theater has WiFi */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., action, comedy, drama) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., U, U/A, A) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being shown */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater where the show is taking place */,
  "showtime" TEXT /* Time of the show */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the show */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the show */,
  "gross_revenue" REAL /* Gross revenue generated by the show */,
  "screen_number" INTEGER /* Screen number where the show is taking place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupancy" (
  "occupancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy record */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate of the theater for the show */,
  "peak_occupancy_time" TEXT /* Time when the occupancy rate was at its peak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the ticket */,
  "row_number" INTEGER /* Row number of the ticket */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "booking_time" TEXT /* Time when the ticket was booked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fastfilling" (
  "fastfilling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fast-filling record */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "fastfilling_status" TEXT /* Status of the show (e.g., fast-filling, sold-out) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for considering a show fast-filling (e.g., 0.8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fastfilling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fastfilling_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soldout" (
  "soldout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sold-out record */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "soldout_status" TEXT /* Status of the show (e.g., sold-out, available) */,
  "soldout_time" TEXT /* Time when the show was sold out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soldout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soldout_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., theater manager, marketing team, executive) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, debit card, net banking) */,
  "payment_time" TEXT /* Time when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)
